name: PR Description Generator
description: Inspects git diff and source changes to draft a structured pull request description

checks.fail: ❌ No .git directory — not a git repository

checks.command: git diff --stat HEAD~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null || git diff --stat HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'no-commits'
checks.fail: ⚠️  Could not collect git diff — ensure at least one commit exists
ℹ️  No version field in package.json

checks.prompt:
You are a senior engineer writing a GitHub pull request description. Based on the project structure and recent changes, generate a concise, professional PR description with the following sections:

## Summary
(1–3 sentence overview of what this PR does)

## Changes
(Bullet list of key changes)

## Testing
(How the changes were tested)

## Notes
(Any important caveats, migration steps, or follow-up items)

Keep the total length under 400 words. Use plain Markdown.
checks.fail: ⚠️  Could not generate PR description (LLM unavailable — provide text manually)
